channel.title: Atrak Blog
channel.description: Insights, tutorials, and stories from building real products

item.title: Building GuidePup: An Accessibility-First Approach
item.description: How we built an iOS app for blind users using GPT-4 Vision and React Native, prioritizing accessibility from day one.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Shipping a Production App: Lessons from Ten Seconds VIP Manager
item.description: What we learned building and deploying a real-world restaurant management system used daily in production.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Emergent Behaviors in AI Predator Simulation
item.description: Exploring how simple rules can create complex, realistic hunting behaviors in our Python-based ecosystem simulation.
item.author: Charlie Han
